caption: A person with blond hair and headphones, wearing a dark t-shirt, appears in a small inset window in the lower left of the screen. The main background consists of a digital sports game interface featuring player cards over a blurred stadium scene. In the first two frames, a player card for "CB" "HĀROLD CARMICHAEL" is displayed, showing a player in a white jersey with the number "17" and an overall rating of "97 OVR". A "LINEUP" button is visible on the right side of the card. In the subsequent frames, the screen transitions to a different player card for "QB" "DREW BLEDSOE", who also has a "97 OVR" rating and is wearing a jersey with the number "17". The "LINEUP" button remains in the same position. The person in the inset window maintains a similar posture and expression throughout the sequence.
